title: Chapter 2: The Rise of New Stars

text_block_list.text: A few days after watching the race. While doing paperwork in the trainer's room, I heard a knock at the door.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
E-Excuse me… 
Thanks for your hard work, Trainer.
choice_data_list: <size=32>Oh, from the other day! What brings you here today?</size>
<size=32>Oh, from the other day! What brings you here today?</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Umm, well… 
I'm sorry about what happened at the Tokyo Racecourse…!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: For making you worry, and for the energy bar… So, today I came to apologize, and… although it's just a small token of my gratitude, I made some motsuni stew.
choice_data_list: M-Motsuni? You went out of your way to make it?

text_block_list.text:
Surprised by her strong sense of duty… I promptly dug 
into the still-warm dish. —It's delicious! The salty flavor is perfectly balanced.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… My name is Chrono Genesis. 
I'm currently serving on the PR committee…
choice_data_list: <size=40>Chrono Genesis… Ah, come to think of it</size>

text_block_list.text: As I discovered the other day, she was the one writing my favorite column, 『Idle History Talk』 In other words, the person standing in front of me right now is—
choice_data_list: Writer C! I absolutely love your column!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Wah! N-No way…! 
That's just a personal memorandum…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
B-But, umm… I'm happy. 
That you would say something like that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
How should I put it, yes… It's really just a hobby of mine… 
So, I didn't think anyone was actually reading it…
choice_data_list: <size=36>That's not true! …Want me to show you proof?</size>
<size=36>That's not true! …Want me to show you proof?</size>

text_block_list.text: I brought out my scrapbook file, where I keep clippings of the most interesting columns. When I told her that the recent St. Lite edition was also amazing—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Eh, this many—… T-Thank you so much…! 
Umm, well… I…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I'll keep doing my best. From here on out… —Hehe.

A few days after that incident. 
While watching a mock race, I spotted her there.

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
Good mile-ning! Let's have a great race today, 
Loves, Chrono!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yes, same to you both. I'll be the one reporting my victory to my followers on today's stream♡

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
N-Nice to race with you… 
I'll be sure to give it my all as well.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …The course condition is good. Since there's distance before the second and third corners, the battle for the front won't be too fierce. A 9-Horsegirl field. Predicted pacesetters: one—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: The pace will likely be slow… There are a few matching races in history. I just need to figure out which one is closest based on how it unfolds…

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Mock race, 1800m on turf… 
And they're all off!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hah, hah, hah, hah—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Number 4 is moving up, looking like she can't hold back. 
This is… The first thing that comes to mind is…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: The 『Ivy Stakes』…The year number 7 won…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (The winning Horsegirl back then ran with a leader strategy— This positioning isn't wrong.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(I still have stamina left. My positioning is good too. 
Now, I just need the right timing—)

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hah— Right here!!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: Coming out of the fourth corner and into the homestretch, Loves Only You is steadily pushing up the pack!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ngh…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (It's okay. I don't need to chase her yet. History is the proof. I'll make my move from a winning position!)

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text: Aaalright, here I gooo… Milerrrrr☆

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…Ghk! Gran too…! 
In this case… No, even in this case…!)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Trust in history—!
…In more ways than one, I couldn't take my eyes off Chrono Genesis. Her calculated pace distribution. Her sharp final spurt. Her tenacity for victory—
She had it all. And yet… Why did it seem like she was somehow—
choice_data_list: It's like she's bound by something…

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
First place goes to Loves Only You! It's Loves Only You! 
Gran Alegria and Chrono Genesis fall agonizingly short!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Hah, hah, hah… 
…A neck behind in 3rd place…

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text: …Gah! As expected of my rivals! More! I need to do even more than I am now. —As the Queen of the Mile.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hehe… It was such a close call, yet your fighting spirit is blazing. I guess I'll have to increase my training, too.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Ngh.

That night. As I was walking down the hallway to go home, 
I saw light spilling out from the library.
choice_data_list: <size=36>Huh… Did someone forget to turn the lights off?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(I need to dig deeper into racing history. After all, everything is in history. What Chrono Genesis needs— 
The answer to that must be there, too.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm still lacking… 
For my dream…—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (If I'm lacking, I have to fill the gap.)

…Her intense, driven demeanor reminded me of when 
she nearly collapsed at the Tokyo Racecourse. Before 
I knew it, I was calling out to her.
choice_data_list: It's not good to push yourself too hard

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: No, but… I have to do this. …I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Eh?
I piled up documents that seemed like they would be useful reference next to her, such as 『The Past and Future of the Tokyo Racecourse』 and 『The History of the Twinkle Series』
choice_data_list: I'll just leave these right here

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Ah. I-I'm sorry. Having you help me gather documents… 
until this late at night…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ………Trainer……
To tell the truth, this was also a form of surveillance. That way, if Chrono Genesis pushed herself too hard, I could immediately step in to support her.
In other words, I was doing it for selfish reasons, so I didn't mind… But there was one thing that bothered me. So, I asked her casually.
choice_data_list: But… why do you go to such lengths?
But… why do you go to such lengths?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I want to become a part of history.
